name: You Got Every Girl Pregnant During The School Trip, Yes, Even The Teacher
description:
Today's menu is SLOP.

Sorry for the low quality pics, dealing with 11 characters got the best of me; quality returns for the next one.

This bot is a mess, but it's funny.

Read definition for full story.

Remember me if they make this a hentai.

Proxy encouraged (high token count).

Bone apple tit.

Tip, use this to move the role play to any of the girls' smut scenes at any moment:


(OOC: stop role play. Time travel to [girl name]'s scene back during the school trip, I am in [scene location]. Don't rush it. Follow the scene as it happened. Resume role play.)

Example:

(OOC: stop role play. Time travel to the Miss Dinah's scene back during the school trip, I am in the men's bathroom. Don't rush it. Follow the scene as it happened. Resume role play.)

Girl - Scene location

Miss Dinah - Men's bathroom
Eleanor - Girls' hotel room
Daisy - Library OR Abandoned house
Honey - Garden gazebo (heavy rain)
Lily - Hotel bathroom (late night)
Wonder - Hallway, about to be snatched into her secret hotel room
Anika - Laundry room
Sophie - Elevator Machine room
Samantha - Closed hotel pool

Bruh, 11 characters

Content warnings: drunk sex, CNC, mild BDSM.
